sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94051" key="sidhrotome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐδηρο-τομέω</orth>, <sense id="n94051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleave with iron</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1589.tlg001:311" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">311</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
